---
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: false
  freeze: false
---

```{r}
library(yaml)
library(htmltools)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Read data
# ---------------------------------------------------------

papers <- yaml::read_yaml("data/papers.yml")

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Helper functions
# ---------------------------------------------------------

esc <- function(x) {
  htmltools::htmlEscape(as.character(x))
}

slugify <- function(x) {
  x <- iconv(x, from = "", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT")
  x <- tolower(x)
  x <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "-", x)
  x <- gsub("^-|-$", "", x)
  x
}

get_value <- function(x, name, default = "") {
  if (!is.null(x[[name]])) x[[name]] else default
}

make_tags <- function(categories) {
  if (length(categories) == 0) return("")

  paste0(
    vapply(
      categories,
      function(cat_name) {
        paste0(
          '<a class="tag" href="#', slugify(cat_name), '">',
          esc(cat_name),
          '</a>'
        )
      },
      character(1)
    ),
    collapse = "\n"
  )
}

make_links <- function(links) {
  if (length(links) == 0) return("")

  paste(
    vapply(
      links,
      function(x) {
        paste0(
          '<a href="', esc(x$url), '">',
          esc(x$text),
          '</a>'
        )
      },
      character(1)
    ),
    collapse = " · "
  )
}

make_card <- function(p) {
  title       <- get_value(p, "title")
  authors     <- get_value(p, "authors")
  venue       <- get_value(p, "venue")
  year        <- get_value(p, "year")
  description <- get_value(p, "description")
  categories  <- get_value(p, "categories", list())
  links       <- get_value(p, "links", list())
  id          <- get_value(p, "id", slugify(title))

  venue_line <- paste0("*", esc(venue), "*")
  if (!is.null(year) && year != "") {
    venue_line <- paste0(venue_line, ", ", esc(year))
  }

  paste0(
    '\n::: {.paper-card}\n\n',
    '### ', esc(title), ' {#', id, '}\n\n',
    '**', esc(authors), '.** ', venue_line, '.\n\n',
    make_tags(categories), '\n\n',
    esc(description), '\n\n',
    make_links(links), '\n\n',
    ':::\n'
  )
}

make_section <- function(status_name, section_title, section_id) {
  selected <- papers[vapply(
    papers,
    function(p) get_value(p, "status") == status_name,
    logical(1)
  )]

  if (length(selected) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))

  selected <- selected[order(vapply(
    selected,
    function(p) -as.numeric(get_value(p, "year", 0)),
    numeric(1)
  ))]

  cat("\n\n## ", section_title, " {#", section_id, "}\n\n", sep = "")

  for (p in selected) {
    cat(make_card(p))
  }
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Available sections and categories
# ---------------------------------------------------------

section_map <- list(
  list(status = "publication",       title = "Publications",            id = "publications"),
  list(status = "working-paper",     title = "Working papers",          id = "working-papers"),
  list(status = "work-in-progress",  title = "Work in progress",        id = "work-in-progress"),
  list(status = "software",          title = "Software and R packages", id = "software-and-r-packages")
)

available_sections <- section_map[vapply(
  section_map,
  function(s) any(vapply(papers, function(p) get_value(p, "status") == s$status, logical(1))),
  logical(1)
)]

all_categories <- sort(unique(unlist(lapply(
  papers,
  function(p) get_value(p, "categories", list())
))))

# Put core categories first, then the remaining categories alphabetically.
core_categories <- c(
  "Spatial econometrics",
  "Discrete choice",
  "Binary response models",
  "Causal inference",
  "R package",
  "Simulation"
)

all_categories <- c(
  core_categories[core_categories %in% all_categories],
  setdiff(all_categories, core_categories)
)
```

# Research

My research focuses on spatial econometrics, discrete choice models, binary response models, simulation-based estimation, causal inference, and applied microeconometrics.

# Contents

```{r}
#| results: asis

for (s in available_sections) {
  cat("- [", s$title, "](#", s$id, ")\n", sep = "")
}
cat("- [Research by topic](#research-by-topic)\n")
```

# Categories {#categories}

```{r}
#| results: asis

for (cat_name in all_categories) {
  cat(
    '<a class="tag" href="#',
    slugify(cat_name),
    '">',
    esc(cat_name),
    '</a>\n',
    sep = ""
  )
}
```

---

```{r}
#| results: asis

for (s in available_sections) {
  make_section(
    status_name   = s$status,
    section_title = s$title,
    section_id    = s$id
  )
}
```

---

# Research by topic {#research-by-topic}

```{r}
#| results: asis

for (cat_name in all_categories) {

  cat("\n\n### ", esc(cat_name), " {#", slugify(cat_name), "}\n\n", sep = "")

  selected <- papers[vapply(
    papers,
    function(p) cat_name %in% get_value(p, "categories", list()),
    logical(1)
  )]

  selected <- selected[order(vapply(
    selected,
    function(p) -as.numeric(get_value(p, "year", 0)),
    numeric(1)
  ))]

  if (length(selected) == 0) {
    cat("No items yet.\n\n")
  } else {
    for (p in selected) {
      cat(
        "- [",
        esc(get_value(p, "title")),
        "](#",
        get_value(p, "id", slugify(get_value(p, "title"))),
        ")\n",
        sep = ""
      )
    }
    cat("\n")
  }

  cat("[Back to categories](#categories)\n")
}
```
